---
title: "95% Accuracy That's Clinically Useless"
subtitle: "ECG arrhythmia classification, class imbalance, and what a confusion matrix actually tells you"
author: "Mani Ravi"
date: today
categories: [ECG, deep learning, signal processing, clinical AI]
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

*[in progress]*
